protein_name: Dephosphorylates and concomitantly deactivates CaM-kinase II activated upon autophosphorylation, and CaM-kinases IV and I activated upon phosphorylation by CaM-kinase kinase. Promotes apoptosis. Belongs to the PP2C family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytosol; nucleus; perinuclear region of cytoplasm; protein-containing complex
